## Security checklist

- [ ] No real secrets, private keys, mnemonics, or API keys in this PR
- [ ] No new env vars without an entry in the relevant `.env.example`
- [ ] No `.env`, `.npmrc`, `*.pem`, or `*.key` accidentally tracked
- [ ] Signing flows remain deny-first
